languages.text: Цивилизация изменила Зарков, превратив его в мир висячих жилблоков, чадащих фабрик и прокалывающих облака шпилей. Многоуровневая корневая система стала основой для городов-ульев, в которых служат Империруму и протекторату миллионы рабочих.

Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.
languages.original_text: Цивилизация изменила Зарков, превратив его в мир висячих жилблоков, чадащих фабрик и прокалывающих облака шпилей. Многоуровневая корневая система стала основой для городов-ульев, в которых служат Империруму и протекторату миллионы рабочих.

traits.locale_text: Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

languages.text: 文明はザルコフを、浮遊する住宅ブロックや煙を吐く工場、雲を突き抜ける尖塔で覆った。階層状の根系は、何百万もの労働者が帝国と保護領のために働くハブシティの基礎となった。
languages.original_text: Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

traits.locale_text: 文明はザルコフを、浮遊する住宅ブロックや煙を吐く工場、雲を突き抜ける尖塔で覆った。階層状の根系は、何百万もの労働者が帝国と保護領のために働くハブシティの基礎となった。

languages.text: 文明改造了扎尔科夫。这个世界如今遍地都是悬浮街区、喷吐浓烟的工厂、以及高耸入云的尖塔。层叠的根系成了巢都的地基，数百万工人在此为帝国和王朝属地效力。
languages.original_text: Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

traits.locale_text: 文明改造了扎尔科夫。这个世界如今遍地都是悬浮街区、喷吐浓烟的工厂、以及高耸入云的尖塔。层叠的根系成了巢都的地基，数百万工人在此为帝国和王朝属地效力。

languages.text: La civilisation transforma Zarkov en un monde de blocs résidentiels suspendus, d'usines crachant continuellement de la fumée et de tours transperçant les nuages. Le système radiculaire à plusieurs niveaux devint la fondation de cités-ruches peuplées de millions d'ouvriers au service de l'Imperium et du protectorat.
languages.original_text: Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

traits.locale_text: La civilisation transforma Zarkov en un monde de blocs résidentiels suspendus, d'usines crachant continuellement de la fumée et de tours transperçant les nuages. Le système radiculaire à plusieurs niveaux devint la fondation de cités-ruches peuplées de millions d'ouvriers au service de l'Imperium et du protectorat.

languages.text: La civilización transformó Zarkov en un mundo de bloques residenciales suspendidos, fábricas que escupían humo y agujas que atravesaban las nubes. El sistema estratificado de sus raíces se convirtió en la base de las ciudades colmena en las que millones de trabajadores servían al Imperium y al protectorado.
languages.original_text: Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

traits.locale_text: La civilización transformó Zarkov en un mundo de bloques residenciales suspendidos, fábricas que escupían humo y agujas que atravesaban las nubes. El sistema estratificado de sus raíces se convirtió en la base de las ciudades colmena en las que millones de trabajadores servían al Imperium y al protectorado.

languages.text: Medeniyet; Zarkov'u asma konut blokları, duman kusan fabrikalar ve bulutları delen kulelerin olduğu bir dünyaya dönüştürdü. Kademeli kök sistemi, milyonlarca işçinin İmparatorluk'a protektoraya hizmet ettiği kovan şehirlerin temelini oluşturdu.
languages.original_text: Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

traits.locale_text: Medeniyet; Zarkov'u asma konut blokları, duman kusan fabrikalar ve bulutları delen kulelerin olduğu bir dünyaya dönüştürdü. Kademeli kök sistemi, milyonlarca işçinin İmparatorluk'a protektoraya hizmet ettiği kovan şehirlerin temelini oluşturdu.

languages.text: Die Zivilisation verwandelte Zarkov in von Wohnblocks, Rauch speienden Fabriken und gewaltigen Wolkenkratzern geprägte Welt. Das vielschichtige Wurzelsystem bildete die Grundlage für Makropolen, in denen Millionen von Arbeitern dem Imperium und dem Protektorat dienten.
languages.original_text: Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.

traits.locale_text: Die Zivilisation verwandelte Zarkov in von Wohnblocks, Rauch speienden Fabriken und gewaltigen Wolkenkratzern geprägte Welt. Das vielschichtige Wurzelsystem bildete die Grundlage für Makropolen, in denen Millionen von Arbeitern dem Imperium und dem Protektorat dienten.
